parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.status, featureName: $json.featureName, errors: $json.errors, summary: 'Plan rejected. Fix errors and retry.' }) }}

parameters.command:
set -e
WORK_DIR="{{ $json.workDir }}"
if [[ "$WORK_DIR" != /tmp/* ]] && [[ "$WORK_DIR" != /private/tmp/* ]] && [[ "$WORK_DIR" != /var/folders/* ]]; then
  echo "ERROR: workDir safety check failed" >&2
  exit 1
fi
rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR/handoff/generated-files"
mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR/handoff/tests"
mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR/logs"
echo "sandbox_ready"

=set -e

WORK_DIR="{{$json.workDir}}"
REPO_DIR="{{$json.repoDir}}"
BRANCH="{{$json.plan.branch || 'main'}}"

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$WORK_DIR"

git clone \
  --depth 1 \
  --branch "$BRANCH" \
  "https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Logitruck/LogiTruckNext.git" \
  "$REPO_DIR"

echo "CLONE_OK"

=REPO_DIR="{{$json.repoDir}}"

ARCHETYPE="{{$json.featureArchetype}}"

TEST_FILE="{{$json.testsWritten[0]}}"

echo "REPO_DIR=$REPO_DIR"
echo "ARCHETYPE=$ARCHETYPE"
echo "TEST_FILE=$TEST_FILE"

cd "$REPO_DIR"

echo "=== INSTALL ROOT ==="
NODE_ENV=development npm install --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps 2>&1 | tail -20

VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=0

if [ "$ARCHETYPE" = "cloud-function-feature" ]; then
  echo "=== INSTALL FUNCTIONS ==="
  (cd "$REPO_DIR/functions" && npm install --legacy-peer-deps 2>&1 | tail -10)

  echo "=== JEST CLOUD FUNCTION ==="
  cat > "$REPO_DIR/jest.functions.config.js" << 'JESTEOF'
module.exports = {
  testEnvironment: 'node',
  modulePaths: ['<rootDir>'],
  testMatch: ['**/__tests__/**/*.test.js'],
  transform: {},
};
JESTEOF

  ./node_modules/.bin/jest "$TEST_FILE" \
    --watchAll=false --forceExit \
    --config "$REPO_DIR/jest.functions.config.js" 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?

elif [ "$ARCHETYPE" = "landing-react-vite-feature" ]; then
  npm run build 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?

else
  echo "=== TSC ==="
  ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?

  echo "=== JEST GENERATED TEST ONLY ==="
  ./node_modules/.bin/jest "$TEST_FILE" --watchAll=false --forceExit 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?
fi

echo "FACTORY_EXIT_CODE=$VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE"

echo "=== FIN ==="

exit 0

=REPO_DIR="{{$json.repoDir}}"

ARCHETYPE="{{$json.featureArchetype}}"

echo "REPO_DIR=$REPO_DIR"
echo "ARCHETYPE=$ARCHETYPE"

cd "$REPO_DIR"

VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=0

if [ "$ARCHETYPE" = "cloud-function-feature" ]; then
  echo "=== JEST CLOUD FUNCTION RETRY ==="
  ./node_modules/.bin/jest \
    --watchAll=false --forceExit --passWithNoTests \
    --config "$REPO_DIR/jest.functions.config.js" 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?

elif [ "$ARCHETYPE" = "landing-react-vite-feature" ]; then
  npm run build 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?

else
  ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?
  ./node_modules/.bin/jest --watchAll=false --forceExit --passWithNoTests 2>&1 || VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE=$?
fi

echo "FACTORY_EXIT_CODE=$VALIDATION_EXIT_CODE"

exit 0

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $json.finalStatus, featureName: $json.featureName, featureArchetype: $json.featureArchetype, executionLevel: $json.executionLevel, workDir: $json.workDir, repoDir: $json.repoDir, handoffPath: $json.handoffPath, filesGenerated: $json.filesWritten, testsGenerated: $json.testsWritten, validationPassed: $json.validationPassed, retryCount: $json.retryCount, errors: $json.errors, summary: 'Factory run complete. Status: ' + $json.finalStatus + '. Validation: ' + ($json.validationPassed ? 'PASSED' : 'FAILED') + '. Files: ' + ($json.filesWritten || []).length + '. Tests: ' + ($json.testsWritten || []).length + '.' }) }}
